rule: Routines gather and write convention files; the engine remains pure.

routines.title: Fundstrat Intake
input_boundaries: Gmail connector full-body reads
Compact full-body-derived Fundstrat daily call rows when connector bodies cannot be safely piped to a file
Operator-supplied Fundstrat website screenshot/text converted into compact action-relevant rows
Fundstrat daily email drop-folder text, eml, or Gmail-shaped json
Direct monthly Fundstrat PDF/text/json uploads

commands.command: python src/fundstrat_email_intake.py --stdin-json --out-dir src --state src/fundstrat_intake_state.json --merge-existing --top-prospects src/top_prospects.json --source-calls src/source_calls.json --log-call-dates src/log_call_dates.json --source-call-summary src/source_call_cache_summary.json

python src/fundstrat_email_intake.py <files> --out-dir src --state src/fundstrat_intake_state.json --merge-existing --top-prospects src/top_prospects.json --source-calls src/source_calls.json --log-call-dates src/log_call_dates.json --source-call-summary src/source_call_cache_summary.json

commands.fallback_for: daytime Pushover alerting after compact full-body-derived rows are merged and validated

routines.verification: python -m pytest src/test_fundstrat_email_intake.py src/test_fundstrat_daily_compact_intake.py src/test_fundstrat_daytime_alert.py src/test_pushover_notify.py src/test_fundstrat_bible_intake.py src/test_fundstrat_daily.py src/test_source_call_cache_merge.py src/test_source_call_candidate_draft.py -q
routines.no_input_behavior: Do not overwrite Fundstrat caches; report Fundstrat as not checked. Low-value Fundstrat fluff can remain audit/discovery context, but must not become a daily-call row, action prompt, or push alert.

routines.title: Catalyst Intake
input_boundaries: Notion Catalyst Calendar connector rows when available
Catalyst Calendar export json or csv
Catalyst drop-folder files
routines.no_input_behavior: Do not overwrite catalysts.json; report catalysts as not checked.

routines.title: Broker Position Intake
input_boundaries: SnapTrade read-only account API via local non-secret profile config and environment secrets
Selectable-text broker PDFs
Broker text exports
Externally generated combined.json

commands.preferred_for: daily market-day account refresh and whenever the operator reports trades

commands.fallback_for: safe validation when the operator wants to inspect staged account data before promotion

commands.command: python src/position_reconciliation.py --combined combined.json --theses src/theses.json --prior-account-positions src/account_positions.json --account-out src/account_positions.json --reconcile-out src/position_reconciliation.json

routines.verification: python -m pytest src/test_broker_pdf_extractor.py src/test_build_positions_cache.py src/test_build_positions_golden.py src/test_position_reconciliation.py src/test_positions_freshness.py -q
routines.no_input_behavior: Do not overwrite position caches; report position extraction as not checked.

routines.title: UW Cache Refresh
input_boundaries: Unusual Whales connector/API results gathered by bounded workers
Supplied UW close-price response JSON for rotation cache
Supplied yield-curve and cross-asset macro JSON for macro state

commands.command: cd src && python -m codex_uw.orchestrator --mode opportunity --entries-dir ../tmp/uw/opportunity_entries --emit-bundle ../tmp/uw/opportunity_bundle.json --emit-cache uw_opportunity_signals.json --max-workers 5 --retry-failed 1

cd src && python -m codex_uw.orchestrator --mode parabolic --entries-dir ../tmp/uw/parabolic_entries --emit-bundle ../tmp/uw/parabolic_bundle.json --emit-cache parabolic_setups.json --max-workers 5 --retry-failed 1

routines.verification: python src/uw_opportunity_scan.py --self-test && python src/parabolic_setup_screener.py --self-test && python src/macro_pulse_scan.py --self-test && python -m pytest src/test_live_source_config_update.py src/test_uw_price_cache_intake.py src/test_macro_freshness.py src/test_uw_macro.py src/test_uw_macro_adapter.py src/test_uw_opportunity_scan.py src/test_full_build_runner.py -q
routines.no_input_behavior: Do not mark UW lanes checked clear; report missing UW input as not checked and skipped or failed tickers explicitly.

routines.title: Daily Synthesis Intake
input_boundaries: Notion Synthesis Log read/write when connector access is available
Supplied Daily Synthesis JSON
Repo-evidence synthesis generated only from an existing cockpit feed
No autonomous market narrative generation
routines.no_input_behavior: Do not overwrite daily_synthesis.json; report Daily Synthesis as not checked.

routines.title: Signal Log Intake
input_boundaries: Notion Signal Log search/fetch rows when connector access is available
Supplied Signal Log JSON
Supplied Morning Scan JSON
Watch-only context; no action promotion
routines.no_input_behavior: Do not overwrite signal_log.json; report Signal Log as not checked.

routines.title: Event Risk Intake
input_boundaries: Supplied daily or weekly event-risk JSON
Supplied news-summary rows from user, Claude build, or an explicit market-event scan
No autonomous headline scraping or invented market narrative

commands.command: python src/event_risk_intake.py --title "<event headline>" --channels "oil,rates,volatility" --tickers "XOP,TNX" --why "<why exposure or timing changes>" --trigger "<what to watch next>" --out src/event_risks.json --summary src/event_risk_intake_summary.json --merge-existing
python src/sudden_event_refresh.py --title "<event headline>" --channels "oil,rates,volatility" --tickers "XOP,TNX" --why "<why exposure or timing changes>" --trigger "<what to watch next>"

routines.verification: python -m pytest src/test_event_risk.py src/test_sudden_event_refresh.py src/test_full_build_runner.py src/test_cockpit_blocks.py -q
routines.no_input_behavior: Do not overwrite event_risks.json; report Event Risk as not checked.

routines.title: Daily Full Build
input_boundaries: Repo convention files only
Manual source-drop JSON when explicitly supplied
No live source acquisition

convention_inputs.missing_behavior: Required position cache; build failure if missing or empty.
Account views are not checked; do not imply no account-level breakdown.
Required thesis map; build failure if missing.
Price-derived lanes are not checked; quiet tape must not read as all clear.
Macro lane is not checked; stale or missing macro must remain visible.
Monthly Fundstrat state is not checked; do not overwrite with empty state.
Daily Fundstrat calls are not checked; snippet discovery is not a clear lane.
Archived Meridian thesis context is not checked when absent; do not treat it as fresh tactical evidence or a live-source gap.
Routine health is not checked; keep heartbeat absence visible.
Signal Log is not checked; missing fetch is not no signals.

convention_inputs.source: reddit/social API or supplied normalized social cache
convention_inputs.missing_behavior: Social Watch is not checked; missing Reddit/social fetch is not no social anomalies.
Event Risk is not checked; missing headlines are not no event risk.
Daily Synthesis is not checked; vague or absent synthesis must not create trades.
Research Queue is not checked; do not overwrite or assume no research.
Catalysts are not checked; absence is not no near-term catalysts.
UW opportunity flow is not checked; missing cache is not quiet tape.
Action aging memory is not checked; missing store is not resolved actions.
Prospects are not checked; missing file is not no prospects.
Source-call cache is not checked; calibration remains provisional.
Inbox date calibration is not checked; do not treat persistence as fully calibrated.
Log date calibration is not checked; do not treat persistence as fully calibrated.
Parabolic risk cache is not checked; missing file is not no chase risk.

routines.verification: python -m pytest src/test_full_build_runner.py src/test_live_readiness.py src/test_heartbeat_status.py src/test_runtime_full.py src/test_cockpit_blocks.py src/test_live_dashboard_refresh.py -q
routines.no_input_behavior: Missing optional source files remain dark lanes; publish gate prevents unsafe feed overwrite.

routines.title: Off-Hours Research Queue
input_boundaries: Research Queue json or csv export
Explicit queue rows only
routines.no_input_behavior: Do not overwrite research_queue.json; report Research Queue as not checked.
